text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, why aren't you picking up?! 
Here I am taking the time to call you back!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hmph! Guess I'll just have to get 
my revenge with a voicemail.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Blue flowers, forget-me-nots☆ 
Shoo, Papa, I'll forget-you-lots!♪

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Aaand done. Oh, I can't even imagine the face
Papa will make when he hears this! Teehee♪
